# `investigations` tools

## `investigations.close`

`implemented`

Close an Investigation (idempotent on closed; errors on abandoned). Requires operator.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `investigation_id` | `string` | yes | The Investigation to drive to closed. |

## `investigations.get`

`implemented` · `read-only`

Render an Investigation by ID. Requires viewer.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `investigation_id` | `string` | yes | The Investigation to render. |

## `investigations.link`

`implemented`

Upsert an external ref onto an Investigation by (tracker, id) key. Requires operator.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `investigation_id` | `string` | yes | The Investigation to add the ref to. |
| `ref` | `object` | yes | External ref to upsert, with tracker, id, and url. |

## `investigations.open`

`implemented`

Mint an Investigation in the open state for the caller's project. Requires operator.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `external_refs` | `any` | no | Optional external tracker refs (each with tracker, id, url). |
| `project` | `string` | yes | Project to create the Investigation under. |
| `title` | `string` | yes | Human-readable title for the Investigation. |

## `investigations.unlink`

`implemented`

Remove an external ref from an Investigation by (tracker, id) key. Requires operator.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `investigation_id` | `string` | yes | The Investigation to remove the ref from. |
| `ref` | `object` | yes | Ref to remove; only tracker and id are used as the key. |
